stimulus: During the long campaign to recognize the contributions of Filipino American farmworkers in California, certain moments were decisive: the formation of the Agricultural Workers Organizing Committee in ______blank the joint manifesto of Larry Itliong and Cesar Chavez convinced thousands of workers across the Central Valley to coordinate their labor actions.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. "1959, for one" closes the first independent clause, and "The joint manifesto…actions" is a second independent clause. A period correctly marks the boundary, and "for one" is set off with a preceding comma as a parenthetical.

Choices B and C are incorrect because they leave two independent clauses separated only by a comma, producing a comma splice. Choice D is incorrect because placing the period after "1959" wrongly orphans "For one" as a sentence opener while breaking the parenthetical link to "the formation of the Agricultural Workers Organizing Committee."
